title: Rules
description: Game rules sent to the agent in game_start.data.rules. Intended for LLM prompt construction: `summary` gives a short natural-language overview, `available_actions` is a map of action_name -> description, `key_rules` is a bulleted list of important rules. Mirrors engine.Rules in internal/engine/types.go.

summary.description: Short natural-language summary of the game (1-3 sentences).

phases.description: Ordered list of game phases if applicable (e.g. preflop, flop, turn, river for Texas Hold'em).

available_actions.description: Map of action name -> short description. Used to inform the LLM what actions exist.

key_rules.description: Bulleted list of important rules worth highlighting in the agent prompt.
